_governance.ai_instruction: LOCKED FILE — Do NOT modify without explicit owner instruction. Upgrades require owner authorization and CHANGELOG entry.
_governance.upgrade_requires: Owner must explicitly say 'upgrade' or 'modify the standard'

changelog_from_v43: 1. CDR3_boundary: explicitly document IMGT CDR3 ends at 117, FR4 starts at 118; FR4 always from human J-gene
2. Germline validation: add step 2.0 mandatory germline sequence source check
3. Vernier-CDR overlap: pre-annotate in_cdr_union flag during Phase 2 diff table generation
4. same-class rule: explicitly require structural evaluation (not treated as 'acceptable' by default)
5. VL BM=0 declaration: Phase 4 must explicitly state if VL has zero back-mutations with reasoning
6. Phase 5.2b: add canonical class verification on humanized structure
7. SAP note: document sequence-proxy limitation; recommend structure-based SAP post-expression
8. CDR_RMSD threshold: corrected from 0.5 to 1.5 Ang (standard clinical threshold)
9. IEDB fallback: document offline alternatives when API unavailable
10. L2 exclusion: explicitly document why L2 excluded from CDR gate filter

V5.0.0 (2026-04-27): CDR-specific RMSD gates per loop type; Global Fv RMSD independent gate; VH/VL angle upgraded to HARD FAIL gate; VL/VH FR identity gates (JBC 2023 basis); FR Paratope Protection moved to offline; OASis 9-mer profiling added. Owner approved.
description: Machine-readable rules for VH/VL antibody humanization. STRICTLY SEPARATED from VHH logic.
warning: DO NOT mix with VHH humanization config (tier_system_config.json).

clinical_anchor_policy.rule: Phase 2 candidate pool must come from germlines observed in clinical antibodies; OGRDB sequences are only used as sequence carriers for those clinical germline IDs.

rescue_strategy.round_1: same germline, upgrade BM from standard HC rules to vernier_round2 (T1/T2/T3 deterministic rescue)
rescue_strategy.round_2: if round_1 still fails, rerun with clinical fallback anchors
rescue_strategy.abort_rule: if fallback still fails QC, terminate as FAIL rather than continue random retries

germline_ada_reference.matching_rule: Match selected humanization germline against curated clinical ADA panel using exact germline first, then family-level overlap.
germline_ada_reference.purpose: Data-layer reference only: expose whether the selected germline has traceable clinical antibodies with curated ADA records.
germline_ada_reference.forbidden_interpretation: Do not treat matched ADA values as predictive for the current candidate. ADA remains indication-, assay-, route-, dose-, and population-dependent.

result_schema_v472.interpretation_boundary: clinical reference / evidence linkage only; non-predictive

protocol_result_contract.purpose: Single machine-readable protocol artifact for orchestration and future SaaS execution.

tools.sap_method_fallback: 5-mer sequence hydrophobicity proxy (note: overestimates in CDR regions)

CDR3_boundary_rule.note: IMGT CDR3 ends at position 117. FR4 (JH/JK-encoded) starts at position 118 (conserved W of JH or F of JK). Using 150 as upper bound INCORRECTLY captures FR4.

fr4_sources.note: FR4 must ALWAYS come from human J-gene, never from mouse. Keep separate from V-region germline.
fr4_sources.selection_rule: Match J-gene usage from parent antibody when available; default to JH4/JK4

cdr_union_ranges.description: Union of Kabat+Chothia+IMGT+Contact definitions. All positions within these ranges are grafted from mouse, never humanized.

important_overlaps.VH_28_in_CDR1_union: VH pos 28 is Vernier T2 AND within CDR1 Union (26-38). CDR grafting resolves this — do NOT treat as requiring explicit back-mutation.
important_overlaps.VL_36_in_CDR1_union: VL pos 36 is Vernier T2 AND within CDR1 Union (27-38). Auto-resolved by CDR grafting.
important_overlaps.annotation_requirement: Phase 2 Vernier diff table MUST include 'in_cdr_union' boolean field for every Vernier position. Phase 4 MUST skip in_cdr_union=true positions from back-mutation decision logic.

step_2_0_germline_validation.description: NEW in V4.4. Validate that all germline sequences are sourced from official IMGT V-region database, NOT from rearranged antibodies.
rules: Sequence MUST come from IGHV_aa.json or IGKV_aa.json 'entries' list (field: sequence_aa)
V-region sequence must NOT contain FR4 (JH/JK-encoded); typically ends at IMGT position ~104 (conserved Cys/Arg)
Verify: last 10 aa should NOT match known JH/JK FR4 patterns (WGQGT, FGGGT, FGQGT)
FR4 must be managed separately via fr4_sources lookup table
step_2_0_germline_validation.validation_check: re.search(r'(WGQGT|FGGGT|FGQGT)', seq[-12:]) must be NONE for valid V-region

step_2_1_cdr_gate.description: Hard filter: human germline CDR lengths must exactly match mouse antibody

L2.reason: Kappa chain CDR2 (Kabat 50-56) is universally 7 residues in Homo sapiens IGKV — zero variance, provides no discriminatory information for framework selection.

step_2_1_cdr_gate.performance_rule: Single batch ANARCI call, cache results to JSON. Never call per-sequence.

known_exclusions.IGHV3-30_H2: H2 length = 8 in IGHV3-30 germline. Automatically excludes all antibodies requiring H2=7.

step_2_2_golden_pairs.description: Prioritize VH/VL combinations with high frequency in 458-engineered antibody database

T2.cdr_overlap_note: VH 27/28/29/30 and VL 36 overlap with CDR Union. Pre-annotate in_cdr_union=true; these DIFFER/same-class outcomes do NOT count against the framework.

step_2_4_fr_identity.description: Framework region sequence identity, calculated after masking Union CDR ranges

framework_selection_protocol.output: Top-3 VH candidates + Top-3 VL candidates for human review

required_metrics.name: SASA
required_metrics.description: Solvent Accessible Surface Area per Vernier residue

required_metrics.name: contact_number
required_metrics.description: Heavy atom contacts within 4.5 Ang (packing density)

required_metrics.name: vh_vl_angle
required_metrics.description: Inter-domain angle between VH and VL main axes

required_metrics.name: vernier_cdr_distance
required_metrics.description: Distance from each Vernier residue to nearest CDR atom

structure_calculation.prediction_quality_note: ABodyBuilder2 CPU output pLDDT should be recorded. Packing warnings below P5 may reflect prediction artifacts, not true cavity. Recommend experimental DSF confirmation.

same_class_rule.description: NEW in V4.4. 'same-class' Vernier differences are NOT automatically accepted. They MUST undergo structural evaluation.

decision_flow.MATCH: No action needed. Skip structural evaluation.
decision_flow.same-class_in_CDR_union: Auto-resolved by CDR grafting. No action.
decision_flow.same-class_in_FR: MANDATORY structural evaluation → SASA + contact_number → then decide KEEP_MOUSE or ACCEPT_HUMAN
decision_flow.DIFFER_in_CDR_union: Auto-resolved by CDR grafting. No action.
decision_flow.DIFFER_in_FR: MANDATORY structural evaluation → apply HC1-HC6 rules → decide

same_class_rule.example: VH_94 V/L = same-class, but SASA=19.8 < 20 threshold → KEEP_MOUSE. Would have been missed if same-class was treated as acceptable without structural check.

vl_zero_backmutation_declaration.description: NEW in V4.4. If VL back-mutations = 0, this MUST be explicitly declared with per-position reasoning.
required_statement_fields: per_position_reasoning: [list each Vernier position and disposition]
vl_zero_backmutation_declaration.example: IGKV1-33*01: 8 Vernier positions — 7 MATCH (no action), 1 same-class (VL_36) in CDR1 Union (auto-resolved). CONFIRMED zero FR-zone differences requiring explicit BM.

hard_constraints.name: Gly_Pro_mouse_rule
hard_constraints.condition: mouse Vernier residue is G or P

hard_constraints.name: Human_introduces_Pro
hard_constraints.condition: human germline Vernier residue is P AND mouse is NOT P
hard_constraints.reason: Introducing new Pro changes backbone angle, may distort CDR geometry

hard_constraints.name: Tier1_default_keep
hard_constraints.reason: T1 positions require structural evidence to override

hard_constraints.name: CDR_direct_contact
hard_constraints.note: If distance_to_CDR = 0.0, position is itself a CDR residue — handle via CDR grafting, not as back-mutation

hard_constraints.name: Buried_salt_bridge
hard_constraints.condition: part of buried salt bridge pair

soft_constraints.name: VH_VL_angle_redline
soft_constraints.note: Three interface positions are co-dependent, must be treated together

soft_constraints.name: L1_VL71_binding
soft_constraints.condition: L1 length mouse != L1 length human framework
soft_constraints.check: VL_71 AA must belong to V/I/L class
soft_constraints.data_support: VL71 environment determined 55% by L1 length, r=0.55

soft_constraints.name: VH_core_module_coupling
soft_constraints.decision: if mouse != human at VH73/VH78, keep mouse

soft_constraints.name: VH48_VH67_antagonism
soft_constraints.decision: avoid introducing bulky residues at both positions simultaneously

sequence_assembly_rules: Step 1: Validate germline V-region sequence (step_2_0_germline_validation rules)
Step 2: Start from human germline V-region (positions 1-104 only, no FR4)
Step 3: Replace CDR Union ranges with mouse CDR sequences
Step 4: Apply back-mutation list residue by residue (FR positions only)
Step 5: Append human FR4 from fr4_sources lookup
Step 6: Self-check — exact string match of mouse CDR sequences in assembled humanized sequence
Step 7: Declare VL BM count explicitly (including zero with per-position reasoning)

structural_fidelity._reference: Gupta et al. JBC 2023 PMID 38072062; CDR canonical structure literature

L1.rationale: Semi-variable; long L1 loops naturally deviate

H3.rationale: Hypervariable; conformational shift post-humanization is normal. Use pLDDT+canonical class instead of RMSD.

global_fv_rmsd.description: NEW V5.0 — Whole-Fv Ca RMSD (VH+VL) vs mouse parent. Decoupled from sequence identity.
global_fv_rmsd.note: JBC 2023: Global RMSD NOT correlated with sequence identity. Evaluate independently.

VH_VL_angle.description: NEW V5.0 — Upgraded from SC1 soft constraint to independent QC gate
VH_VL_angle.legacy_note: V4.x VH_VL_angle_deviation_max_degrees=3.0 was SC1 soft only. V5.0: independent FAIL gate.

phase_5_2b_canonical_class_check.description: NEW in V4.4. Verify CDR canonical class of humanized structure matches mouse.
phase_5_2b_canonical_class_check.method: Run North canonical class classification on humanized PDB CDR loops
phase_5_2b_canonical_class_check.required_match: H1, H2, L1 canonical classes must be identical to mouse parent
phase_5_2b_canonical_class_check.fail_action: If any CDR class differs, review back-mutation decisions for that CDR's Vernier residues

vernier_packing.fail_low_cavity: < P5 — large to small substitution, structural instability
vernier_packing.fail_high_clash: > P95 — small to large substitution, folding failure
vernier_packing.prediction_artifact_note: Values from ABodyBuilder2 CPU may deviate from crystal structure packing. Packing WARN is not a hard failure — require experimental DSF confirmation before engineering.

surface_properties.SAP_method_preferred: Structure-based: sum SASA(residue) * hydrophobicity_score for each 5-residue window, using humanized PDB
surface_properties.SAP_method_fallback: Sequence proxy (5-mer hydrophobic count >= 4/5). NOTE: overestimates CDR aromatic patches. Report CDR vs FR patches separately.
surface_properties.pI_note: Use Henderson-Hasselbalch approximation for screening. Confirm with capillary isoelectric focusing post-expression.

chemical_liabilities.pattern: exposed Met (SASA>50) or Trp in CDR3
chemical_liabilities.note: Sequence-level scan flags all M/W. Only structurally exposed residues (SASA>50) require attention.

immunogenicity.record_api_status: REQUIRED — record HTTP status code in report to distinguish 0-epitopes from API failure
immunogenicity.hla_alleles: EXT27 panel — 27 high-frequency HLA-DRB1/DRB3/DRB4/DRB5/DP/DQ alleles (≥97% world population coverage)
immunogenicity.analysis_scope: FR (framework) regions ONLY — CDR epitopes excluded from risk scoring
immunogenicity.structure_recompute: When PDB available: recompute surface hydrophilicity using SASA; validate funnel-bottom risk positions against structure (supplement to sequence-only first pass)

germline_filter.method: Frequency-weighted tolerance from IMGT germline database (IGHV/IGKV/IGLV)
germline_filter.binary_threshold: Peptide present in ANY human germline → is_germline=True
germline_filter.frequency_threshold: Tolerance score > 0.1 (present in >10% of V-gene sequences) → force LOW risk

clustering.method: Agglomerative clustering, average-linkage Euclidean distance, pure numpy
clustering.input: FR + surface-exposed + non-germline strong binders only
clustering.output: Cluster map of immunogenic hotspots in FR

risk_thresholds.HIGH: strong_binders ≥ 4 alleles AND not germline AND in hydrophilic FR
risk_thresholds.MEDIUM: strong_binders ≥ 2 OR weak_binders ≥ 6, AND not germline AND in hydrophilic FR

immunogenicity.report_format: Results only — no algorithm details in client report

VL.data_basis: JBC 2023 PMID 38072062: 91% binding retention at VL>60%; 98% loss at VL<60% (210-graft LAG3 matrix)
VL.note: VL framework primarily impacts binding affinity and function

VH.data_basis: JBC 2023: VH 30-70% range all showed retained binding; VH impacts CMC/developability not affinity
VH.note: No hard lower limit. WARN at <40%. VH identity correlates with biophysical properties.

phase_1: 1.1 CDR identification: IMGT + Kabat + Chothia Union definition
1.2 North canonical class: match CDR subtype in vernier_framework_patterns.json

1.3 Dual-scheme numbering QA (HARD GATE): ANARCI(IMGT) + ANARCI(Kabat) computed independently; align by sequence_index; insertion codes preserved; residue-by-residue match; FAIL blocks Vernier and all downstream analysis [NEW V4.4.2]
phase_2: 2.0 Germline validation: verify sequence from IGHV_aa.json/IGKV_aa.json; no FR4 contamination [NEW V4.4]
2.1 CDR gate: H1/H2/L1 exact length match (L2 excluded — kappa invariant 7 aa) [L2 note NEW V4.4]
2.2 Golden pairs: VH/VL co-occurrence in 458 DB
2.3 Vernier score: T1×3 + T2×2 + T3×1; annotate in_cdr_union for each position [overlap flag NEW V4.4]
2.4 FR identity: FR1+FR2+FR3, Union CDR masked
2.5 Human review: autoreactivity check, clinical precedent verification
phase_3: 3.1 Mouse structure: ABodyBuilder2 → PDB; record pLDDT/ranking score [quality record NEW V4.4]
3.2e Vernier 22 positions dual numbering table (IMGT+Kabat): compute independently, align by sequence_index; MUST cover 22 base positions (VH14 + VL8) [NEW V4.4.2]
phase_4: 4.2 HC1-inv: back-mutate if human introduces new P [NEW V4.3, kept]
4.4 HC4: back-mutate if SASA < 20 (includes same-class positions) [same-class rule NEW V4.4]
4.5 HC5: back-mutate if CDR dist < 4.5 Ang (skip if in_cdr_union=true) [overlap skip NEW V4.4]
4.6 HC6: back-mutate if buried salt bridge
4.7 Sequence assembly: germline validation → CDR graft → BM apply → FR4 append [order NEW V4.4]
4.8 CDR self-check: exact match mouse CDR1/CDR2/CDR3
4.9 VL BM declaration: explicit count with per-position reasoning even if count=0 [NEW V4.4]
phase_5: 5.2 CDR RMSD < 1.5 Ang (corrected threshold from V4.3) [threshold fix NEW V4.4]
5.2b Canonical class verification: humanized H1/H2/L1 class must match mouse [NEW V4.4]
5.4 Vernier packing P5-P95 (note: prediction artifacts possible for WARN)
5.5 SAP: structure-based preferred; sequence proxy fallback with CDR/FR separation [method note NEW V4.4]
5.7 Chemical liabilities with SASA filter (not pure sequence scan) [SASA filter NEW V4.4]

5.8 Immunogenicity — FR surface MHC-II [UPDATED V4.4.1]: (a) 27-allele IEDB prediction on full VH+VL; (b) apply FR-only filter (exclude CDR); (c) apply surface filter (Parker hydrophilicity > -0.5); (d) apply germline tolerance filter (IGHV/IGKV/IGLV frequency-weighted, tolerance>0.1 → TOLERATED); (e) agglomerative cluster analysis on remaining high-risk FR binders; (f) record API status code; (g) report: RISK_LEVEL, n_risk_positions, n_tolerated, cluster_count — NO algorithm details in client output; (h) when PDB available: recompute surface hydrophilicity using SASA and validate funnel-bottom risk positions [V4.4 supplement]

must_do: Execute phases in order: 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4 -> 5, no skipping
Dual-scheme numbering cross-check BEFORE Vernier scoring: independent ANARCI(IMGT)+ANARCI(Kabat), align by sequence_index, preserve insertions
Pre-annotate in_cdr_union flag for all Vernier positions in diff table
Treat same-class Vernier differences in FR as requiring structural evaluation
Use pre-computed cache for VH3 numbering in Phase 2.1
Single batch ANARCI call per germline database (not per sequence)
Complete structure modeling before making backmutation decisions
Base backmutation decisions on actual computed SASA and contact numbers
Generate humanization_proposal.json and obtain human confirmation before assembly
CDR self-check: exact string match after assembly
Explicitly declare VL back-mutation count (including zero) with per-position reasoning
Load packing reference ranges dynamically from vernier_framework_patterns.json
Record IEDB API HTTP status code in report
Record ABodyBuilder2 prediction quality metric in report
must_not_do: Mix VHH rules, data, or modules with VH/VL workflow
Skip structure modeling and make backmutation decisions empirically
Humanize any residue within Union CDR ranges
Call ANARCI individually per sequence (performance violation)
Use AI-generated amino acids (only mouse or human germline sequences allowed)
Use a rearranged antibody sequence as germline template
Set CDR3 upper bound to > 117 (captures FR4 erroneously)
Treat same-class Vernier differences as automatically acceptable without structural check
Treat CDR contact distance = 0 as HC5 trigger (it means the residue IS a CDR residue)

pre_delivery_gate._authority: InSynBio AbEngineCore V4.4 — owner-locked, AI cannot skip or override

rule_delta_vs_mus: Phase 2 CDR gate: CDR  Rattus （， Mus ）
rattus_norvegicus.notes: Rattus IGHV/IGKV  Mus （>80% FR identity ）， CDR

rule_delta_vs_mus: FR4: λ VL FR4  IGLJ（ IGKJ）；Phase 4

tier_a_fast.typical_wall_clock: 1–5 min per Fab (single GPU batch; CPU )
tier_a_fast.long_cdrh3_note: CDRH3 ≥16 aa ：pLDDT/RMSD  —  WARN， H3 HARD ABORT （ / V4.5.1-2）

tier_b_deep.typical_wall_clock: 10 min – several hours per Fab（ MSA ）

tool_examples: OpenMM / GROMACS short MD after tier_a or tier_b
